hero.title: Enterprise Software Development
hero.description: Nungunianun nungunianun havagviup atuqtakhait nutaanik tungavikhanik, API-hivuliq havauhiit, uvalu cloud-native aktilaangit.

problem.title: Nanminikkut Ayuqhautit Tungaviit
problem.subtitle: Talvani havakviup pinahuarutingit tammaiyut kayumiittumik, maniknik, ihumaliurhimayuniklu ihuarhainiq

approach.title: Qauyimayiuyut Atuqtakhait
approach.subtitle: Qanuq ihuaqhaqtavut nalunaqtut piyakhat havaktauyunun-upalungaiyariiqhimayut tungaviit

principles.title: Hanayaunigani Pitquhiuyut
principles.subtitle: Piliurluni ihumaliurutingit pihimagiami havakviup timiqutigiyangit munarittaaqtuq aktikkulaangani

problem.overview: Havakvikmi havaktut piqaqtut akhuurutauyunik havaangit ahiruqhimayuni timiqutigiyangit, pipkaidjutiyuq akuniraalukmik pipkaidjutiyuq, ihuangittut nampangit, akituvallaaqtuqlu makpiraat ihuarhainiq havakviknit.
painPoints: Tunigiami uqariiyaqtamiknik qaangiutiyuq taimaa ihariagininngit tamainnut havaqatigiiktunut munariyaunginmat
Havaalluangit qanuriliurutingit aadjikutariyait tamainni qanuriliurutingit hunavaluillu
Utuqqait ilaliutiniit piliuqtut nutaanik atuqtakhanik aullaqtirutikhanut qajangnaqpiaktumik kajumiittumiklu
impactSignals: Apqutikhaliuqhimayuq ikiqliyuummiktut qauyimayiuyut maniit atuqpagait akittuqyuummikhutik

approach.overview: Aulatitihimaaqpaktugut napaqtirutikharnik hivullirmi nalvaaqhiyaangat, kaantulaaliqiyunik auladjutikharnik, munagiyauyuniklu auladjutikharnik hanayiingit taima nanminiqaqtunik akikhangit tuyuqtauyaangat naunaitumik angikliyumirutikharnik.

pillars.title: Domain Modeling & Bounded Contexts
pillars.detail: Nunauyaliuqtavut nayugait naunaiyagiangani kivgaqtuutit kikliit ikiliyuumigiangani havaqatigiingnikkut uvalu naunaiyagiangani nanminiqarniq.

pillars.title: API-Hivuliq Ilaliutinikkut Hanaqidjutit
pillars.detail: Naunaiyaqtavut ihuaqtumik kaantrangit qilaminnuaq, pipkaidjutiyuq aadjikutariiktumik piliurninnga qayangnaittumiklu ilaliutiniq havakviup timiqutigiyanginnut.

pillars.title: Aulahimaaqtumik Tunihinikkut Havauhiit
pillars.detail: Atuqpaktugut takudjutiqhanik, aadlatkiingnik takupkaqtittiplutik, nakuuqpiaqtuniklu takupkaqtittiyaami qilaminnuaq ihuirutauhimaittumik havaktauyunut.

principles.overview: Nappaktirinirmun ihumaliurutivut hivulliutivaktait hivitunikhaanut, aulapkaidjutikhanut, naunaitpiaktumiklu nanminiriyauyunut taimaa tunngaviit hungiutittaaqtut nanminiit angiglivalliakpata.

items.title: Ilariiktut Atuqtakhanik Kiklikhait
items.detail: Pittaarninnga iliuraqhimayuq havakvikmi pihimagiami aadlangurniq pilaqutinga nunamiknut.

items.title: Hulidjutinun-Pihimayut Ilauqatigiingniq
items.detail: Asynchronous workflows atuqtauvaktut talvani latency tolerance ittuq ihuarhigiami akhuurninnga piiyariamilu timiqutigiyangit.

items.title: Tautungnikkut Idjuhiitigut
items.detail: Naunaiyainiq, uuktuutingit, ihuarhaqhimayullu naunaitkutat naunaiqtauyut hivun'ngani ikayuriami nakuuyumik aulapkaininngit unalu SLA piyunnautinga.

breakdown.title: Discovery & Architecture
breakdown.summary: Nunauyaliuqtavut havaamut hivulliutiyakhat, ayurnaqtunut kiklikhangit, tikinnahuaqtavullu piliurninnga atuliqtinnagu.

breakdown.title: Piliurniq Ilaliutiniqlu
breakdown.summary: Havaqatigiiktut atuliqtitivaktut atuqtakhanik, ilaupkaidjutikhanik, imaalu nakuukpiaktunik qajangnaitkutikhanik atauttikkut.

breakdown.title: Aullaqtirutaa Aallanguqpallianingalu
breakdown.summary: Atuliqtaukpat, ihuaqhihimaaqtavut auladjutit uvalu naunaiyaqhugit aipaa ihuaqhiyuumigutikhat pihimayut atuqtauluaqtunun.

cta.title: Upalungaiqqit piliuriami tuklianik atuqtakharnik?
cta.description: Piliuqta tuyurlugulu ihuarhaidjutimik pipkaidjutiyuq naunaiyainiq havakviup qanurittaakhaanik.

hero.title: AI, ML unalu Business Intelligence
hero.description: Itqungniarutikkut atugahat atanguyanun naunaitkutit, havakhugit tamatkiumayut AI/BI auladjutit tapkua ikayuutauyut ihumaliurutinun aktilaangitigut.

problem.title: Nanminikkut Ayuqhautit Tungaviit
problem.subtitle: Huuq nampanik piqaqpiaqtuq timiqutigiyauyut ayurhaqtut nakuuyumik ihumaliuriamikni

approach.title: Qauyimayiuyut Atuqtakhait
approach.subtitle: Qanuqtut aulapkaidjutivut nampanik hunavaluit, ML uuktuutingit, unalu BI havaangit

principles.title: Hanayaunigani Pitquhiuyut
principles.subtitle: Nampangit uuktuutingillu piliurninnga uuktuutingit ukpiriyaugiami ihumaliurniq ayuittiarniq

capabilities.title: Pittaaqtaptingnik
capabilities.subtitle: Tamatkiumayut AI, ML, unalu BI ihuaqhautit

breakdown.title: Atuqtakhanut Aviktuqhimaniit
breakdown.subtitle: Qanuq nuutpaliayugut ahiruqhimayunit naunaipkutinik hanayaunigani qauyimaniriyaptiknik

problem.overview: Timiuyut katitiqhiqataqtut amigaitunik naunaiyautinik kihimi numiktitiyuitut ihuaqtumik itqungniarutinun, auladjutinun ihumaliurutinun, uvaluuniin aktilaaqtaaqtunun nanminikkut hulidjutinun.
painPoints: Naunaipkainiq qanurittaakhaanik aadlangayuq tamainni havaqatigiiktunit, pipkaidjutiyuq ayurhautipkaiyuq KPI uqaqtanginnik
Nampangit qanurittaakhaanik ihumaaluutingit hakuiqtiqtait ukpiriniq naunaiyaininnganut atan'nguyanullu naunaitkutingit
impactSignals: Ihumaliurniq aulavikhangit kayumiitun taima iligiiktun aivadjutigivakhimayait naunairutikhangit ihuarutikharnik hanaqidjutikharnik
Itqungniarutit uvalu upalungaiyautit ihuangnirit ihuangitut hitamani tatqiqhiutini
Analytique maniliurutit tautungnaqtut mikiyut tiguaqtauyut hilataani taiyauhimayut qauyihaiyit katimayiit

approach.overview: Tunihivaktugut AI unalu BI atuqtakhanik piliurutikhanut atuqtakhat, katipkaqhugit naunaitkutikhat hanadjutikhat, atuqtakhat aturnikhanut aulapkaidjutikhat, imaalu ihumaliurutikhanut havauhikhanut ilaupkaidjutikhat.

pillars.title: Nampanik Hunavaluit Tunngavinga
pillars.detail: Domain-aligned data products piliuqtut atuffaaqtaaqtunik, munariyauyunik, nakuuqpiaqtuniklu iliuraidjutinik analytics unalu ML.

pillars.title: MLOps Aturninnganik Aatumatiliriniq
pillars.detail: Ayuirhainiq, iliurainiq, munariniq, unalu ahiruqtirninnga munariniq inmikkuuqtut pihimagiami uuktuutingit nakuuqpiaqtumik piliurninngani.

pillars.title: Ihumaliuqnikkut Havauhiit Ilaliutiniq
pillars.detail: Ihumagiyauyut ilaliutihimayut auladjutinun ikayuutinun uvalu naunaitkutinun taimaali iligiit havagiangini ayuittiarnikkut ubluni havauhiini.

principles.overview: Uvagut AI/BI havauhiit hivuliutiyait ukpingnaqtut naunaiyautit, naunaiyaqtaaqtut atugahat, uvalu ataniudjutiqaqtut piyaangnirit atugahat tamaini havagvingni.

items.title: Attauhiq Uuktuutit Naunaiyautait
items.detail: Hivituyut KPI naunaiqtauyut atauhiqmik aadlanut piyut uuktuutingit piiyariami ayurhautingit naunaipkainiq qanurittaakhaanik.

items.title: Uuktuutinga Nakuuninnga Munariniq
items.detail: Havaamut kiklikhangit, ahiruqtirninnga naunaiyainiq, utiffaarniqmullu qanuriliurutingit hapummiutiyuq ihumaliurniqmut qanurittaakhaanik piliurninngani.

items.title: Qayangnairutikharnik Kavamaliqidjutikharniklu Havaktauhimayunik
items.detail: Nampangit qanurittaakhaanik, havaamut piinarialaqihimaniq, unalu ihivriurniqmut upalungaiyarhimayuq munariniq iliuraqhimayut tamainni turhuani.

breakdown.title: Naunaiyautit Tungaviit
breakdown.summary: Ihivriuqtavut ikayuutit, naunaiyaqhugit naunaiyautit katulaat, havakhugillu ataniudjutit taimaali tamaita atugahat aularutiyut ukpiriyauyunik uqautauyunik.

breakdown.title: Atugahaq uvalu Tautuktuumiyaangnikkut Tunihiniq
breakdown.summary: Piliuqpaktugut atuqtakhanik ihumaliurutikhaniklu naunaitkutikhanik pidjutiqaqtunik naunaijaruminaqtunik havaakhanut apiqqutaujunik imaalu KPI-nik.

breakdown.title: MLOps unalu Tiguarniq
breakdown.summary: Aulapkaqtitavut atuliqniginik, amirijutinik, ikayuqtiriiniklu pipkaiyaagani qanurilinigit nalaumayaagani pivikhaqaqnigani.

cta.title: Aadlangurlugit nampatit tautuktuuyaaqtarnik
cta.description: Ihuaqhaqlugit aviktuqhimayut naunaiyautit naunaitumik, hulidjutikhanun kangiqhidjutit.

hero.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
hero.description: Amigaittunik-cloud-nik atuqtakhat, mahulingaittut nappaqtirutikhat, imaalu ihuaqhaqtaaqtut nappaqtirutikhat piliuqtauhimajut hivitujumut angiglivalliadjutikhanut.

problem.title: Nanminikkut Ayuqhautit Tungaviit
problem.subtitle: Huuq cloud-mut uuktuutikhat nutqaqtitauvaktut kinguagut hivullirmik nuutiqtaudjutanit

approach.title: Qauyimayiuyut Atuqtakhait
approach.subtitle: Qanuqtut piliuqqita qayangnaittumik, aadlanguqtaaqtumik cloud-mut tunngavingit munariyauyumik nuutirnirmut qayangnautinga

principles.title: Hanayaunigani Pitquhiuyut
principles.subtitle: Tungavikkut ihumaliurutit tapkua aadjikiiklugit ayungnaitumik, mahulingainiqmik, uvalu ataniudjutikkut

breakdown.title: Atuqtakhanut Aviktuqhimaniit
breakdown.subtitle: Naunaittuq ihuarhaininnga piliurninnganut, nuutiqtirniq, aulapkaininngalu cloud-mut tunngavingit

problem.overview: Amigaitut timiuyut iniqtiqtait hivulirmik cloudmik nuutirnirit kihimi aulayut nayugaani havaqatigiit, tautungnaluangitut, ihuangitumik munaridjutit, akituqyuumiblutiklu akiliqtuiyut.
painPoints: Havaangit nuutiqtaujut piqangittumik atuinnaqtaminik munariniq unalu ilauqatauniq munariniq
Cloud-mut akingit angikliyuumiqtuq qilaminnuaq havakviup akinga tuniyauyuq
Avatinga tuniqhaininnga pihimmaaqtuq makpiraaq ihuangittuqlu tamainni havaqatigiiktuni
impactSignals: Ihivriurniq upalungaiyarniq nakuuhuiqtuq ahiruqhimayumit piyunnautinga pitquhingit

approach.overview: Piliuqpaktugut cloud-mut tunngavikhanik atuqtakhanik, atuqhugit nappaqtirutikhanut aatumatikkut, atugakhanut qajangnaitkutikhat, imaalu nuutirnikhanut nallaumajut havagviup qajangnarniinut.

pillars.title: Tulakviup Kiklia Naunaitkutaa
pillars.detail: Kinauyaakhaanik, havaqatigiikniq, munariniq, maligamullu tunngavingit naunaiqtauyut piffaariamikni ihivriunginnariamilu.

pillars.title: Maliktigut-pihimayut Nuutingnikkut Hanaqidjutit
pillars.detail: Havaakhat nuutpaktut munariyauyunut atuqtakhanut ihariagininnganut ilihimaniq ihuarhainiq utiffaarninngalu upalungaiyarniq.

pillars.title: SRE + FinOps Operating Loop
pillars.detail: Ihuangnikkut naunaiyautit uvalu maniliungnikkut ihivriuqtauyut attautimun ihuaqhiyuumigiangani tamangnun auladjutainun uvalu akiliqtuinikkut ihuaqtumik.

principles.overview: Napaqtirutikhavut atuqtakhavut ihuarijait uqariijautikhat nappaqtirutikhat, mikitqijanik-pilaarutit pivikhat, imaalu ihuaqhaqtaaqtut atuqtakhat ikajuutikhat kajumiktumik atuqtakhanik tunihidjutikhanik.

items.title: Aalanguqtaaqtut Igluqpait Idjuhiit
items.detail: Avatingit piliuqtauffaaqtut versioned code ikikliyuumiriami ahiruqtirninnga ayurnaittumiklu aulapkaininnganut utiqtiffaarniq.

items.title: Amirittiarnikkut Tunngavinga Default
items.detail: Ukpiriyaungituq piyaaqniq munagidjutit uvalu maliguagahat aghuurutit ilauyut tamaini avatingni auladjutaini.

items.title: Mahulingainiq Tuniqhainikkut
items.detail: Hivituyut havaakhat piliurhimayut amihunut-kikliqaqtunut amihunulluuniit avikturhimayunut ihuirutingit talvani havakviup pilaqutinga ihariagiyauyuq.

breakdown.title: Hanatyuhikhaa Tulakvialu Kiklia
breakdown.summary: Naunaiyaqtavut tikinnahuarutinga qanurittaakhaanik, hapummiutingit, tunngavingalu tunngavinga maliktakhat havaat nuutiqtinnagu.

breakdown.title: Nuutirniq unalu Tunngavinga Piliurninnga
breakdown.summary: Aulatitivakhimayugut nuutirutikharnik auladjutikharnik aulatitivakhimayugutlu cloud-native hanaqidjutikharnik hanaqidjutikharnik atuffaagiaqaqtunik ayungnairutikharnik.

breakdown.title: Ihuarninnga unalu FinOps
breakdown.summary: Ihuaqhiyuumiqtavut auladjutit ihuangnirit aulahimaaqtumik ihuaqhiyuumiqhugit cloudkut akiliqtuutait pihimayut tadjamin alguyaqtuutikkut.

cta.title: Agikligiaqlugu Hanayakhat
cta.description: Piliurluni cloud-mik tunngavikhanik mahulingaittumik piqpiaqtumi nunaryuami iliuraidjutaani.

hero.title: DevOps unalu Platform Engineering
hero.description: Inmikkut tuniqhaininnganik turhuangit, qun'ngiarniq, tunngavingalu ayuirhainiq ihuarhiyait kayumiktilaanganik humaangittuq pittaarninnga.

problem.title: Nanminikkut Ayuqhautit Tungaviit
problem.subtitle: Huuq tuniqhaininnga kayumiktilaanga mikhiyuq tunngavinga ayurnaqtuq angikliyuumirumi

approach.title: Qauyimayiuyut Atuqtakhait
approach.subtitle: Qanuq aadjikiiliqlugit tunihinikkut tughuat kayumiiqtihimaitumik tamayanik iligiit

principles.title: Hanayaunigani Pitquhiuyut
principles.subtitle: Tungavikkut idjuhiit tapkua aktilaangit ihuangnirit uvalu iligiit inmikuuqpalianiq

breakdown.title: Atuqtakhanut Aviktuqhimaniit
breakdown.subtitle: Ihuaqtuq apqutikhaq tuniqhaininnganit ayurhautingit quulitqiamut ukpiriyauyuq tuniqhaininnga

problem.overview: Timiqutigiyauyut maniliuqpaktut CI/CD hanalrutinik kihimi ayurhaqtut ihuangittumik tuniqhaininnganik, kayumiittunnuamik angirutinik, ahiruqhimayumiklu nanminiriniq tamainni avatingani.
painPoints: Turhuangit tukiliurutingit aadlangayut havaqatigiiktunit, pipkaidjutiyuq ihuangittumik qanurittaakhaanik
Makpiraat atuliqnigagut agirutit kiguvariarutauyut ihuaqhaqniginik qanuriniginiklu hatqiqniginik pivikhaqaqniginik
Aulapkainiqmut qanuriliurutingit piffaaqtut taimaa alrujaqtuqtut naunaiyainiq iniqhimanginmat iliuraqtauyulluuniit
impactSignals: Hivitunikhaa aallanguqtirnirnun amigaiqjuummiraanginnaqtun pigaluaqtillugit qaritaujakkuurutikkut akiliqtuinirnik
Hanayiit havauhiit ikiklivaliayut hanalrutainit ihuilijutauniginit qanuriniginiklu aalaguqniginik

approach.overview: Piliuqtugut iluanit piliurninnga tunngavinga uuktuutimik atuffaaqtaaqtumik pipeline uuktuutingit, maligamut piyut piyunnautinga, tamaallu aturninnganik qun'ngiarniq.

pillars.title: Golden Path Pipeline Templates
pillars.detail: Atuffaaqtaaqtut CI/CD blueprints aadjikkiiktut piliurnirmik, uukturnirmik, qayangnaitkutikhanik naunaiyainirmik, imaalu aullaqtiutikhanut havauhikhanik.

pillars.title: Platform API unalu Self-Service
pillars.detail: Havaqatigiiktut tunivaktait avatingit tunilugillu aulapkaitjutikhanik munariyauyumut inmigut pivikhainut qaritauyakkuurutit.

pillars.title: Nakuuniqarninganun Kiudjutikkut Pidjutit
pillars.detail: Hulaqutikkut qanuriniit, SLO aaniaqtailiniq, uvalu atulingnikkut alguyaqtuutit kangiqhidjutauyut aulahimaaqtut havauhiit uvalu havauhiit ihuaqhiyuumirutit.

principles.overview: DevOps piliurninnga aadjikutariyaa tuniqhaininnga kayumiktumik piyunnautinganut ayurhautipkaiyuq munariniq ikikliyuumiqhugulu atauhiqmik aulapkaiyuq havaaq.

items.title: Tamaita Versioned Code
items.detail: Turhuat, aulapkaitjutikhat, atugakhanullu maliktakhat munariyauyut pivigiyauyunit munariyauyut ihivriuruminaqtumik piffaariamilu.

items.title: Aulahimmaaqtuq Naunaiyainiq
items.detail: Qanurittaakhaanik, munariniq, havaamullu naunaiyainiq iliuraqtauyut tamainni qanurittaakhaanik naunairiami qayangnautinga qilaminnuaq.

items.title: Aadlanut Piyuq Tunngavinga Munariniq
items.detail: Tungavikkut havaqatigiit tunihiyut qighuqtiqhimayumik apqutinik piyaarnirit tamayat havaqatigiit pihimablugit agyangnikkut nanminiriyait.

breakdown.title: Tungavikkut Naunaiyautit
breakdown.summary: Ihivriuqtavut tadja qaritauyaliqutit tuniqhaininnga ilitarigiami qayangnautingit kayumiktumiklu kiklikhangit.

breakdown.title: Tuqhuangit uvalu Auladjutikkut Havaktauyut
breakdown.summary: Atuliqtavut ihuaqtut CI/CD, nakuuniqhait angmaqtirutit, uvalu igluqpait ayungnaitumik aadjikiiktumik tuhaqtidjutit.

breakdown.title: Aulapkaqlugit Nakuuhivallialugitlu
breakdown.summary: Havaktavut tautungnikkut uvalu ataniudjutikkut tapkua ikayuutauyut aulahimaaqtumik tunihinikkut ihuaqhaidjutit.

cta.title: Kayumiktumik aulatitiyaangat auladjutikharnik
cta.description: Ikikliyumiqtitiyaangat auladjutikharnik ayungnautikharnik ihuaryumiqtitiyaangatlu atuguminaqtunik talvuuna iniqtiqhimaaqtunik DevOps atuqtakharnik.

hero.title: Nampanik Aadlangurninnga unalu Qanuriliurutikhat
hero.description: Ihumaliurhimayuq uqaqatigiikniq iniqtirninngalu ikayuutikhaq nutaanguqtiriami tunngavingit, havaqatigiiktut, aulapkaininngalu uuktuutingit.

problem.title: Nanminikkut Ayuqhautit Tungaviit
problem.subtitle: Talvani aadlangurninnga pinahuarutingit tammaiyut akhuurninnga atan'nguyangillu

approach.title: Qauyimayiuyut Atuqtakhait
approach.subtitle: Qanuqtut numiktiqtavut qanuriliurutikhat iniqtiruminaqtunik, qaritauyakkuurutinik-pidjutiqaqtunik aallannguqtirutinik

principles.title: Hanayaunigani Pitquhiuyut
principles.subtitle: Aulapkaiyuq uuktuutinga tunngavingalu piumayangit hapummiutiyuq aadlangurninnga qanurittaakhaanik

technology.title: Qaritauyaliqinikkut Katitiqhimayut
technology.subtitle: Tungaviit uvalu tungavikhat atuqtavut aulapkagiangani aalanguqtiqniq

breakdown.title: Atuqtakhanut Aviktuqhimaniit
breakdown.subtitle: Ihuaqhaqhimayut aalanguqtirnirit haffumanga hanaqidjutit naunaiyautainun aktilaangitigut nanminikkut akiit

problem.overview: Nampanik havauhikhat ilaani pilihaaliqtut hakugiktumik pinahuaqhutik kihimi pilimaittut tuniqhaininnganut qanurittaakhaanik naunaittumik nanminiriyauniq, atangittut hanalrutingit, unalu akitaqutautiyut hivulliutiyakhat.
painPoints: Aadlangurninnga apqutinga naunairhimayuq kihimi numiktiqtaungittuq tuniqhaininnganut piyunnautinga
Nanminikkut uvalu hananikkut hivuliuyughat aalangayut kinguani upalungaiyautit auladjutait
Utuqqait aulapkainiqmut uuktuutingit nutqaqtitait tiguarniq nutaanik hunavaluit tuniqhaininnganik
impactSignals: Havaami akiligauyut akituriaqhimayut atulirumayauyut KPI-mi aulanigit aulagitut
Havauhikhat pingittut nuutiqtauniq ukunanit qanuriliurutikhat, piliurninnga, iniqtirutingalu
Havaqatigiiktut atuqpagait aadlangurniq unaguhungniq kikliqaqtumik ilihimaniq havakviup akinga

approach.overview: Attautimuktavut hanaqidjutit uqaudjinikkut tunihinikkut havauhiit, ihuaqhaqhugit auladjutikkut atugahat idjuhiit, tungaviit piyaarnirit, uvalu iniqtirutait aktilaangit tikinahuarutit.

pillars.title: Nakuuniqhakkut Hivuliuyughat
pillars.detail: Ihuaqhaqhugit pinahuarutit pihimayut aktilaangitigut nanminikkut hulaqutainun uvalu ayungnaqtutigut ayuqhautit.

pillars.title: Tikinnahuaqtamiknik Aulapkaiyuq Uuktuutinga Piliurninnga
pillars.detail: Havaangit, kavamaliqidjutingit, ihumaliurutikharnik pidjutikharnik naunaiyagiikhimayut ikayuutikharnik qilaminuaq auladjutikharnik avatingni nanminiqaqtunik qaritauyaliqidjutikharniklu iliqatigiiktunik.

pillars.title: Naunaitkutinik Tuniqhainiq Ataniqtuqtuiyut
pillars.detail: Aadlangurninnga havaanga munariyauyuq ukunuuna KPI-atayut naunaiyainiq unalu naunaitkutingit-ittut qayangnautimut munariniq.

principles.overview: Aadlangurninnga piliurninnga naunaiqtaa angikliyuumiqtuq nutaanguqtiriniq naunaittumiklu kiuttaarniq, pittailiyuq ulapiqutigiyauyunik titiraffaarniq piqangittumik havakviup naunaitkutanganik.

items.title: Havakvikmi Pittaarninnga Ihuarhainiq
items.detail: Ayuitaminik aadlangurninngit ihuarhaqhimayut pittaarninnganut talvunga piyuq maniliurutikhanut, ikayuutikhamut qanurittaakhaanik, akinganikluuniit ihuaqtumik.

items.title: Composable Platform Strategy
items.detail: Tunngavinga ilagiyangit tikkuaqtauyut interoperability ikayuriami aadlangurninnga kayumiktumiklu hungiutiniq.

items.title: Kavamaliqidjutikhangit Auladjutikharnik Auladjutikharnik
items.detail: Ihumaliurnikkut katimadjutit uvalu munaridjutikkut pidjutit ilauyut sprint uvalu hitamat tatqiqhiutit tatqiqhiutit auladjutait, pidjutaungitut ilikuuqtut kavamaliqinikkut auladjutait.

breakdown.title: Qanuriliurutikhat Nallaumaningit
breakdown.summary: Ihuaqhaqtavut hivuliqhuqnikkut hivuliuyukhat uvalu qagitauyakkut tikinahuagutit havagiangini havaqatigiiknikkut aalanguqtiqnikkut atugahanik.
deliverables: Aadlangurninnga tikinnahuarutingit unalu nakuuyumik iniqtirninnga naunaitkutingit

breakdown.title: Iniqtirutinganut Maligutikhaq
breakdown.summary: Naunaiyaqtavut tikinnahuaqtamiknik aulapkaininnganut uuktuutinga, piliurninnga naunaitkutat, unalu aadlatqiinik iniqtirutinga ihuarhaininnga.

breakdown.title: Aadlangurniq Ilumuurutingalu Ilihimaniq
breakdown.summary: Aulatitihimaaqpaktugut tiguarnikkut, munagihimaaqhugit KPI auladjutikharnik, ihuaryumiqtitiyaangatlu hanaqidjutikhangit talvuuna auladjutikharnik naunairutingnik.

cta.title: Aularutilugu Aalanguqtirnirmun Auladjutit
cta.description: Naunaiyaqlugit aalanguqtirnirit naunaitunik hivuliuyughanik ihuaqtuniklu tunihinikkut upalungaiyautinik.

hero.title: IoT unalu Edge Computing
hero.description: Atadjutiqaqtut auladjutit hanaqidjutinin hamunga cloudmun, alguyaqtungnikkut naunaiyautit uvalu kikliit ayuittiaqtut havagvikyuanun aktilaangit.

problem.title: Nanminikkut Ayuqhautit Tungaviit
problem.subtitle: Huuq atadjutit-hanaqidjutit pinahuarutit ihuangitut avatiinun uuktuutit

approach.title: Qauyimayiuyut Atuqtakhait
approach.subtitle: Qanuqtut piliuqtavut qayangnaittumik, aulapkaittaaqtuq IoT timiqutigiyangit hunavaluknit qaritauyaliriniqmut APIs

principles.title: Hanayaunigani Pitquhiuyut
principles.subtitle: Edge-to-cloud-mut piliurninnga maliktakhat nakuuninnganut, latency-mut, unalu fleet piyunnautinga

breakdown.title: Atuqtakhanut Aviktuqhimaniit
breakdown.subtitle: Qanuq tunihiyugut atadjutinun auladjutinun kikliitigut hanaqidjutit hamunga cloud intelligence

problem.overview: IoT uuktuutikhat naunairutauvaktut ayurnaqtunut ihuarnirit hivulliqpaami kihimi nakuungittut aktilanganik ihuanginmat atadjutit, hakuiqtut tingmitit munaridjutait, nakuungittumiklu ilaupkainiq havagvingni havauhikhainut.
painPoints: Qaritauyakkuugutiqhanut ilaliutiyut aturniatigutlu munaridjutait pidjutihimmaaqtut ihuittumik pidjutivaktut
Alrujaqtuqtunik naunaiyainiq turhuangit piliuqtuq nipiquqtuyumik, iniqhimaittuq, tuuliiqtumikluuniit aulapkaiyuq nampangit
Ungahiktumit aquiqtuutikhaq unalu firmware nutaanguqtiriniq naunaipkaqtaa aaniqtailiniq munariniqlu qayangnautinga
impactSignals: Hivulliqpaat avatingit nakuuyumik piyut, kihimi piliurninnga naunaipkainiq kiklikhanga qangiqtaunginnaqtuq
Maniqami auladjutikkut iligiit pidjutigiyait hulaqutit tautungnaitumik
Havakvikmi timiqutigiyangit pilimaittuq aturiami hunavaluknik ayuitaminik talvainnakmi

approach.overview: Piliuqtavut IoT tunngavingit munariyauyumik tuniqhaininnganik timiqutigiyangit, ilaliutiyuq hapummiutiyuq kiklinga aulapkaininnganik maliktakhat, quviahuutimut piyuq iliurainiq, aulapkaininngalu piyunnautinga fleet aktikkulaangani.

pillars.title: Qayangnaittumik Device Lifecycle Munariniq
pillars.detail: Tuniqhainiq, kinauyaakhaanik, kiluutanik himmauhirniq, qaritauyaliqutingillu nutaanguqtiriniq inmikkuuqtut ikikliyuumiriami aulapkaininnganut qayangnautinga.

pillars.title: Event-Driven Telemetry Architecture
pillars.detail: Streaming pipelines ihuariyait, tutqighaqhugit, aulapkaqhugillu tamayat hulidjutit naunaiyainirmun munarinirmunlu qilamik.

pillars.title: Fleet Operations Control Tingmiti
pillars.detail: Munariniq, naunaipkainiq, ungahiktumilu pitquyauyut havaangit tuniyuq nakuuyumik munariniq tamainni tuniqhaininngani piqutit.

principles.overview: IoT havauhivut aadjikiikhugit mikiyumik-latency kikliit ihumaliurutit qitqani ataniudjutit, tautungnaqtut, uvalu munaridjutit maligahat.

items.title: Edge Autonomy with Cloud Coordination
items.detail: Ihariagijauqpiaqtun nunallaani aulapkaidjutit aulahimmaaqtun qaritaujakkuurutit nungutpalliadjutaani atauttikkuuqtiqhugillu qanurinniit cloud-mun pidjutinun hailihimaliraangata.

items.title: Kaantraaktitauhimayut Hulidjutinun Idjuhiit
items.detail: Hanaqidjutit uvalu tungaviit iligiit atuqhugit ataniudjutiqaqtut atugahat tamaqtailiyaangani alguyaqtuutit ihuangnirit tamaini versionsni.

items.title: Ukpiriyaungitut Tamayat Munaridjutit
items.detail: Atauttikkut tutqighaidjutit, mikitqiat pilaarutit, uvalu naunaiyaqhimayut nuutirutit aghuurutauyut tamaini hanaqidjutini ilauqatigiingnirmun.

breakdown.title: Device & Edge Strategy
breakdown.summary: Naunaiyaqtavut atadjutikkut atugahat, kikliit auladjutait atugahat, uvalu qayangnaitumik iluaniitut maniqami tamayat.

breakdown.title: Alrujaqtuqtunik Naunaijainiq unalu Munariniq Tingmiti
breakdown.summary: Piliuqpaktugut turhuakhanik naunaikhidjutikhanik hulipkaidjutikhanik, uuktuqhugit qaritaujakkuurutikhat, imaalu pillahipkakhugit unngahiktukkut munaqhidjutikhainnik havauhikhanik.
deliverables: Digital twin unalu piqutingit uuktuutinga iniqtirutinga

breakdown.title: Auladjutit uvalu Aktilaangit
breakdown.summary: Aulapkaqtitavut aghaluutit munaridjutit uvalu ihuangnirit munaridjutit havaktauyunun-aktilaangit IoT avatingit.

cta.title: Iliuraqlugit Qaritauyakkuugutitit
cta.description: Havaklugit ihuaqtut IoT ihuaqhaidjutikhat upalungaiqhimayut havaktauyunun.
